name: rubric lock pin mismatch blocks rule execution until the operator reconciles or refreshes the snapshot
command: mkdir -p rubric .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'version: 2.0.0\n' > rubric/RUBRIC.yaml && printf '{"rubric_version":"1.5.3"}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/lock.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/version-check.sh" --rubric rubric/RUBRIC.yaml --lock .claude-tdd-pro/lock.json --enforce 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'lock_mismatch' err.txt && grep -q 'lock=1.5.3' err.txt && grep -q 'current=2.0.0' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
